rule_metadata.title: A Member Was Added to a Security-Enabled Global Group

rules.rule_text:
title: A Member Was Added to a Security-Enabled Global Group
id: c43c26be-2e87-46c7-8661-284588c5a53e
related:
- id: 9cf01b6c-e723-4841-a868-6d7f8245ca6e
  type: obsolete
status: stable
description: Detects activity when a member is added to a security-enabled global
  group
references:
- https://www.cisecurity.org/controls/cis-controls-list/
- https://www.pcisecuritystandards.org/documents/PCI_DSS_v3-2-1.pdf
- https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/CSWP/NIST.CSWP.04162018.pdf
- https://www.ultimatewindowssecurity.com/securitylog/encyclopedia/event.aspx?eventID=4728
- https://www.ultimatewindowssecurity.com/securitylog/encyclopedia/event.aspx?eventID=632
author: Alexandr Yampolskyi, SOC Prime
date: 2023-04-26
tags:
- attack.privilege-escalation
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1098
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: security
detection:
  selection:
    EventID:
    - 4728
    - 632
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
